nasb.text: They shall not take a woman who is profaned by harlotry, nor shall they take a woman divorced from her husband; for he is holy to his God.

esv.text: They shall not marry a prostitute or a woman who has been defiled, neither shall they marry a woman divorced from her husband, for the priest is holy to his God.

cnv.text: 祭司不可娶被玷辱了的妓女為妻，也不可娶被丈夫離棄的女人為妻；因為祭司是歸他的　神為聖的。

ccb.text: 他们不可娶妓女或被休的女人为妻，因为祭司要为了我而保持圣洁。
